ValidationRule.description: MIS-2095 -only managers and sales ops can change status from Unqualified
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: text( PRIORVALUE(Status__c)) = "Unqualified" && ISCHANGED(Status__c) && and( $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User No DF", $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $User.Id<>Owner.ManagerId )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The contact is unqualified, Please contact Your manager or Salesops to change the status
